info.name: NotiCore API
info.description: Full endpoint collection for NotiCore -- a multi-channel notification microservice. Covers creating, viewing, cancelling, and replaying notifications. Set the {{baseUrl}} variable (defaults to http://localhost:8080) and, for endpoints needing an ID, either paste one manually or use one returned by a previous request.

variable.description: Paste a notification ID here to use in the ID-based requests below

request.description: Creates a new notification. Saved as PENDING, then published to the matching Kafka topic (notifications.email/sms/push) for processing.
Same endpoint as Email creation, just with channel: SMS -- demonstrates routing to a different Kafka topic and consumer group.

Deliberately missing userId, recipient, and message. Should return a 400 Bad Request thanks to @Valid + @NotBlank on CreateNotificationRequest -- demonstrates the validation layer without needing to write any test assertion code.
Set the notificationId collection variable to an ID returned by a Create request, then run this to fetch its current status.

item.name: Get All Notifications for a User

request.description: Returns every notification ever created for this userId, regardless of status.

Only works while the notification is still PENDING (i.e. before the consumer has processed it). Returns a 409 Conflict with a clear error message if it's already RETRYING/SENT/FAILED/CANCELLED -- try running this a moment after Create to catch it in time, or immediately after to see the 409 error path.

Only works on a notification currently at FAILED status (i.e. sitting in the dead letter queue). Resets it to PENDING and republishes it to its original channel's Kafka topic for another full attempt. Returns a 409 Conflict if the notification isn't currently FAILED.
